patch.value: Governance test: enforce manifest pm_min_version and manifest_version on all first-party packages
After declaring pm_min_version, a governance test (like coverage-allowlist/marketplace drift-lock) prevents future omission as package count grows.
Test reads all packages/pm-*/extensions/*/manifest.json and asserts non-empty pm_min_version + integer manifest_version; failure names the offending file; in vitest include; runs in static gate.
After declaring pm_min_version, a governance test (like coverage-allowlist/marketplace drift-lock) prevents future omission as package count grows.

value.author: sdk-version-compat-agent
value.text: Governance test merged into tests/unit/package-manifest.spec.ts (NOT a new file -- tests/unit is at the 120-file cap). New 'declares manifest_version and pm_min_version on every first-party package manifest' test reuses the existing collectBundledExtensionDirectories() helper to glob all packages/pm-*/extensions/*/manifest.json, parses each, and asserts integer manifest_version + non-empty-string pm_min_version. Both assertions carry a message that NAMES the offending manifestPath on failure. Runs in the normal unit suite (static gate). Verified: PM_RUN_TESTS_SKIP_BUILD=1 run of extension-loader.spec.ts + package-manifest.spec.ts = 2 files passed, 61 tests passed.

patch.value: Manifest-version governance test added to package-manifest.spec.ts, reusing collectBundledExtensionDirectories(); prevents future omission of manifest_version/pm_min_version as the package count grows.

Governance test merged into tests/unit/package-manifest.spec.ts (no new file — tests/unit at 120-file cap): globs all packages/pm-*/extensions/*/manifest.json and asserts integer manifest_version + non-empty pm_min_version, naming the offending manifest path on failure. Runs in the standard unit/static gate. Verified passing.
